activation_gate: Deferred. Adapter implementation starts only after the schema and production-base requirements are stable and the current ComfyUI work is not blocked by this future layer.

external_references.name: Blender command line and background automation
external_references.usage: Blender-first adapter can run scripted scene import, fitting, simulation prep, render-pass export, and validation from command line.

external_references.name: SideFX Houdini hython/hbatch batch workflow
external_references.usage: Optional Houdini adapter can run procedural/SDF/Vellum-style simulation and render/export tasks through command-line tools.

external_references.name: Unreal Python command-line scripting
external_references.usage: Optional Unreal adapter can automate editor/script tasks for physics assets, animation, rendered passes, and real-time simulation evidence.

external_references.name: DAZ Studio scripting
external_references.usage: DAZ is treated as prototype sculpt/source intake and scriptable export surface, not the production physics authority.

external_references.name: DAZ silent FBX export sample
external_references.usage: DAZ prototype packages can be exported without interactive export dialogs when DAZ is available.

external_references.name: DAZ neutral prototype boundary
external_references.usage: DAZ is a neutral A/T-pose prototype and export source only; DAZ dForce, grip posing, hand posing, runtime morphing, production rigging, and production deformation are not allowed after prototype registration.

external_references.name: Marvelous Designer Python API
external_references.usage: Optional clothing adapter can automate garment import, simulation, and export where licensed/available.

external_references.name: Marvelous Designer export API list
external_references.usage: Optional clothing adapter can export OBJ/Alembic and related artifacts for downstream fitting, collision, and map baking.

purpose: Define the adapter layer that can call Blender first, then optional Houdini, Unreal, DAZ, Marvelous/CLO, or ComfyUI-only approximation routes without manual work or drift.

requirements.acceptance_criteria: simulation_request_schema has schema, command contract, availability behavior, bounded execution, output manifest, validation evidence, and fallback/blocker handling.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously implement or block machine-readable request for region, owner, motion, gravity, contact objects, softness, damping, frames, and ComfyUI map outputs; never require interactive/manual backend work during normal execution.
requirements.notes: machine-readable request for region, owner, motion, gravity, contact objects, softness, damping, frames, and ComfyUI map outputs
requirements.title: Define adapter requirement simulation_request_schema

requirements.acceptance_criteria: backend_capability_matrix has schema, command contract, availability behavior, bounded execution, output manifest, validation evidence, and fallback/blocker handling.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously implement or block capability table for Blender, Houdini, Unreal, DAZ, Marvelous, and fallback ComfyUI-only approximation; never require interactive/manual backend work during normal execution.
requirements.notes: capability table for Blender, Houdini, Unreal, DAZ, Marvelous, and fallback ComfyUI-only approximation
requirements.title: Define adapter requirement backend_capability_matrix

requirements.acceptance_criteria: backend_availability_license_check has schema, command contract, availability behavior, bounded execution, output manifest, validation evidence, and fallback/blocker handling.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously implement or block detect installed backend, license availability, command path, version, and allowed execution mode without blocking current project work; never require interactive/manual backend work during normal execution.
requirements.notes: detect installed backend, license availability, command path, version, and allowed execution mode without blocking current project work
requirements.title: Define adapter requirement backend_availability_license_check

requirements.acceptance_criteria: backend_selector_policy has schema, command contract, availability behavior, bounded execution, output manifest, validation evidence, and fallback/blocker handling.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously implement or block choose cheapest valid backend; Blender first; optional Houdini/Unreal/Marvelous/DAZ only when available and required; never require interactive/manual backend work during normal execution.
requirements.notes: choose cheapest valid backend; Blender first; optional Houdini/Unreal/Marvelous/DAZ only when available and required
requirements.title: Define adapter requirement backend_selector_policy

requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously implement or block Blender command-line/background adapter for import, fitting, map baking, render-pass export, and validation; never require interactive/manual backend work during normal execution.
requirements.notes: Blender command-line/background adapter for import, fitting, map baking, render-pass export, and validation
requirements.title: Define adapter requirement blender_background_adapter

requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously implement or block bounded runtime, logs, termination, and no endless backend process loops; never require interactive/manual backend work during normal execution.
requirements.notes: bounded runtime, logs, termination, and no endless backend process loops

requirements.acceptance_criteria: adapter_security_policy has schema, command contract, availability behavior, bounded execution, output manifest, validation evidence, and fallback/blocker handling.
requirements.autonomous_behavior: Autonomously implement or block no secrets printed, no untrusted scripts, quarantined external assets, deterministic output directories; never require interactive/manual backend work during normal execution.
requirements.notes: no secrets printed, no untrusted scripts, quarantined external assets, deterministic output directories
requirements.title: Define adapter requirement adapter_security_policy

requirements.notes: standard manifest for frames, maps, hashes, backend, versions, settings, and QA evidence

requirements.notes: record seeds, backend versions, base mesh version, request hash, and output hashes
requirements.title: Define adapter requirement deterministic_seed_and_versioning
